highlights.title: Once close enough for an acquisition, Stripe and Airwallex are now going after each other
highlights.description: For most of its life, Airwallex and Stripe have mostly operated in different geographies, selling to different buyers. That's changing.

highlights.title: How a quantum computer can be used to actually steal your bitcoin in '9 minutes'
highlights.description: Part one explained the physics of quantum computing. This piece explains the target — how bitcoin's encryption works, why a quantum algorithm breaks it, and what Google's paper changed about the timeline.

highlights.title: China Central Bank’s Pan Flags AI Risks, Opportunities at IMF
highlights.description: China’s central bank governor Pan Gongsheng said artificial intelligence is driving a new wave of technological and industrial transformation that brings both opportunities and risks to the global economy.

highlights.title: Apple wins latest round in Masimo fight as ITC closes Apple Watch import ban case
highlights.description:
Apple just scored an important win in its ongoing battle with Masimo over patents related to the Apple Watch’s blood oxygen feature. Here are the details.
more…
